memory:memory/2026-04-19.md:142:145.snippet: WebRTC / Networking Discussion: **WebRTC P2P** — Direct connection, needs signaling server (PeerJS cloud); **IPv6 direct** — Would work without relay, but mobile broadband blocks inbound; **NAT hole punching** — Requires coordinated timing (both sides connect simultaneously); **M

memory:memory/2026-04-19.md:147:147.snippet: WebRTC / Networking Discussion: Key insight: IPv6 doesn't solve firewall issues — home routers and mobile carriers still block inbound by default.

memory:memory/2026-04-19.md:149:149.snippet: WebRTC / Networking Discussion: **Best portable solution:** WebRTC with STUN/TURN + signaling relay (what PeerJS provides).
